Base_基础配置:
!
sysname {{ hostname }}
!
clock timezone BJ add 08:00:00
!
telnet server disable
!
local-user {{ admin_user }} class manage
 password simple {{ admin_pass }}
 service-type telnet ssh http https
 authorization-attribute user-role network-admin
!
local-user {{ oper_user }} class manage
 password simple {{ oper_pass }}
 service-type telnet ssh
 authorization-attribute user-role network-operator
!
local-user {{ escape_user }} class manage
 password simple {{ escape_pass }}
 service-type telnet ssh
 authorization-attribute user-role network-admin
!
line vty 0 63
 authentication-mode scheme
!
lldp global enable
stp global enable
password-recovery enable
transceiver unapproved-source enable
!
vlan {{ mgmt_vlan }}
 description MGMT_Management
!
interface Vlan-interface{{ mgmt_vlan }}
 ip address {{ mgmt_ip }} {{ mgmt_mask }}
!
